name: Lumax Auto Technologies Limited
summary: Lumax Auto Technologies Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells in automotive components for the two, three, and four wheeler industries in India. It offers intake systems, integrated plastic modules, two wheeler chassis and lighting products, gear shifters, seat structures and mechanisms, oxygen sensors, and telematics products and services, as well as electrical and electronics components, and aftermarket products. The company serves original equipment manufacturers and the aftermarket segments. It also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Dhanesh Auto Electricals Limited and changed its name to Lumax Auto Technologies Limited in 2006. Lumax Auto Technologies Limited was founded in 1981 and is based in New Delhi, India.
